title: The Countdown Tightens
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on the countdown tightens, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Countdown Tightens. Vivi and the others hunt for the hidden cannon before the final explosion can destroy both armies. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Not even a single scratch... That's a bit of a shock.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: This is my first time seeing someone stand up after taking all those attacks.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: It's a fact that you and I have never fought before.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Now I get it. He's a human blade so any part of his body can become the edge of a blade.

summary: This part develops the countdown tightens and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
